title: Tren
description: The best performance modpack out there
body:
![shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee7638e99f8e6cc8047e693a951032828c98d118_0.webp)

# Functionality
The modpack aims to include the maximum possible performance, by utilizing all compatible performance mods for minecraft 1.21. I have been researching the mods since 1.21's relase and many of the core mods for this project are discontiniued, for this reason, I do not plan on updating it to future versions anytime soon.

# What features does it add
It adds proximity chat for supported servers, capes being visible and ~59x more performance.

# My experience
This is the modpack I personally use for 1.21 and it got me from 95fps in vanilla to 5593fps with it.

# Why you should download it
This is the very best performance improvement minecraft can have and is very difficult to beat.
If you ever wanted to run high end shaders on potato hardware, with this modpack - you can! (not recommended) If you cant even run minecraft on 10 fps on your pc, with this modpack, you can crank the settings up and outclass some high end computers in performance.


<details>
<summary>the catch</summary>

If you decide to use shaders with this modpack, you will soon relise why I do not recommend always using them with the modpack.
- Shaders often break the 3d render of the game in such a way where it ghosts a white model of where you look.
- More often you will encounter how shaders cause the skybox to render of the wrong size, causing a white cube around the camera.

These bugs happen because of distant horizons.

You also get some artifacts in more distant chunks, this happens because the modpack uses 4 renderers in the backend.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Updates</summary>

This modpack will most likeley not be updated for future versions of minecraft for these reasons:
- Some mods are discontiniued
- Some mods are incompatible in other versions
- Some mods are exclusive
- Some mods break in other versions
- Some mods require libraries that are incompatible
- Some mods skip versions

</details>
